title: duguetia pauciflora
intro: Duguetia pauciflora, a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae, is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Duguetia pauciflora include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant's bark and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that are used to harness its medicinal properties.
